description: You are a project manager at DevLabs. After a planning meeting, the team has decided to pull the centralized log aggregation work into Q1 2025 to unblock the Kubernetes deployment. The Kubernetes cluster setup has also been deemed the critical path for both the Mobile App v2.0 release and the log aggregation deployment, so it needs to be re-prioritized. In the Infrastructure & DevOps project, move the 'Implement centralized log aggregation with OpenSearch' issue from the 'Q2 2025 Goals' milestone to the 'Q1 2025 Goals' milestone and change its priority to 'High'. Update the 'Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads' issue priority to 'Immediate' and add the comment: 'REPRIORITIZED: K8s setup is now the critical path for Mobile App v2.0 Release deployment and log aggregation rollout. All blockers must be cleared this sprint.' Finally, create a new Support issue in the Infrastructure & DevOps project with the subject 'Q1 2025 sprint scope change notification', priority 'Low', status 'New', assigned to 'alice.chen', and description: 'Log aggregation pulled forward to Q1 2025. Kubernetes priority raised to Immediate. Q1 scope now requires capacity review — please confirm team availability with engineering leads before sprint start.' Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!
